positive: A hyper-detailed, central composition of glowing celestial fauna nestled within geometric bioluminescent jungle flora. The main subject is a constellation-inspired dragon coiled around stylized jungle vines and crystalline flowers. Use a deep indigo, emerald green, and shimmering gold color palette. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and bioluminescent cyberpunk aesthetics. Focus on sharp, clean silhouettes and strong rim lighting to ensure high contrast suitability for apparel printing. The composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical. Hyper-maximalist, graphic illustration, vector art quality, print-ready.
